message:
feat(claim): implement atomic claim guard source changes (beads_rust-3e5j)

Add TOCTOU-safe claim logic to update_issue() via IMMEDIATE transaction:
- IssueUpdate gains expect_unassigned, claim_exclusive, claim_actor fields
- Assignee check moved inside mutate() closure for atomicity
- Config: claim.exclusive key controls exclusive mode
- build_update() passes claim config to IssueUpdate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
